query:
SELECT ci.id, ci.name, ci.price, ci.groupId, cg.name as groupName 
FROM complementItems ci 
JOIN complementGroups cg ON cg.id = ci.groupId 
WHERE cg.productId = 150090 
ORDER BY cg.name, ci.name 
LIMIT 30;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35dchGD4KrPJFby.860a56c722bc --database enmWmXpAt34diouyKU4TE2 --execute SELECT ci.id, ci.name, ci.price, ci.groupId, cg.name as groupName 
FROM complementItems ci 
JOIN complementGroups cg ON cg.id = ci.groupId 
WHERE cg.productId = 150090 
ORDER BY cg.name, ci.name 
LIMIT 30;
